restaurants.introTemplate:
Hey {{business_name}}!

I noticed you have a great restaurant listing on Google Maps in {{location}} but don't have a website for direct online ordering.

We build custom ordering websites that let you take direct orders on WhatsApp without paying Zomato/Swiggy commissions.

Here are some of our previews:
- Preview 1: {{demo_link1}}
- Preview 2: {{demo_link2}}

Reply back if you want to see a free mockup built for your restaurant!
